phonetic: k蓹蕣藢蓴藧d瑟藞ne瑟蕛(蓹)n
examples: Learning to drive is all a matter of coordination.
Intoxication interferes with speech and coordination.
You need good hand-eye coordination to play ball games.
Organizational structure and coordination mechanisms of adult literacy and NFBE in neighbouring coutries: Sharing good practices.
The UNESCO Chair in Gender Research strengthens the coordination and development of policy-relevant gender equality research.
